message:
conformance: add executors for io_internal_ops.json _IO_* functions

Adds 26 executors for internal glibc _IO_* stdio functions including
_IO_adjust_column, _IO_adjust_wcolumn, and various no-op stubs.
These implement native no-op/stub behavior matching glibc internals.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
